message:
style+chore: cargo fmt tidy, let-binding hoist, Cargo.lock catchup

Three small no-behavior-change items bundled:

- crates/fsqlite-pager/src/pager.rs: one assert_eq! was formatted across
  three lines; cargo fmt collapsed it to two (data[0] and *fill on the
  same line). No semantic change.

- crates/fsqlite-e2e/src/overlay_honesty_gate.rs: the benchmark-honest-
  gate test was passing an inline vec![...] expression directly to
  build_benchmark_honest_gate_report(&[…]). Hoisted it to a let
  summaries = vec![…] so the temporary doesn't live only for the call
  (gets named for debug prints and makes the assertion easier to read).

- Cargo.lock: catchup for the fsqlite-mvcc dep that commit 156439aa
  ("test(pager): add bd-3wop3.8 acceptance tests ...") added to
  crates/fsqlite-pager/Cargo.toml but never regenerated the lockfile
  for. Single-line addition under the fsqlite-pager package entry.
